title: Drying Out Timer
description: Adds a timer for drying out that will count down and fire 'dried_out_event' or will stop as soon as the entity will get under rain or water and fire 'stopped_drying_out_event'

dried_out_event.title: Dried Out Event

recover_after_dried_out_event.title: Recover After Dried Out Event

stopped_drying_out_event.title: Stopped Drying Out Event

total_time.title: Total Time
total_time.description:
Amount of time in seconds to dry out fully.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 120

water_bottle_refill_time.title: Water Bottle Refill Time
water_bottle_refill_time.description: Optional amount of additional time in seconds given by using splash water bottle on entity.
